name: Session 3 & 4 - Automated Daily Cash Flow Report (Tutorial)

parameters.content: 🧮 Calculates totals by category for both

nodes.name: Daily at 6 PM2
nodes.notes:
⏰ DAILY TRIGGER
Runs every day at 6:00 PM
Generates end-of-day report

nodes.name: Get Cash Inflows1
nodes.notes:
💵 FETCH INFLOWS
Retrieves all incoming payments
Today's deposits & revenue

nodes.name: Get Cash Outflows1
nodes.notes:
💸 FETCH OUTFLOWS
Retrieves all outgoing payments
Today's expenses & bills

nodes.name: Calculate Inflows1
nodes.notes:
🧮 CALCULATE INFLOWS
Sums total incoming cash
Groups by category
Counts transactions

nodes.name: Calculate Outflows1
nodes.notes:
🧮 CALCULATE OUTFLOWS
Sums total outgoing cash
Groups by expense category
Counts transactions

nodes.name: Merge Data2
nodes.notes:
🔀 COMBINE DATA
Merges inflows + outflows
Prepares for final report

nodes.name: Calculate Net Cash Flow2
nodes.notes:
📊 NET CALCULATION
Total Inflow - Total Outflow
Determines cash position
Positive or Negative status

nodes.name: Generate HTML Report2
nodes.notes:
📄 CREATE REPORT
Builds HTML formatted report
Includes all categories
Summary + detailed breakdown

nodes.name: Backup to Google Drive2
nodes.notes:
☁️ CLOUD BACKUP
Google Drive storage
Folder: /finance/reports/
Automatic archiving

nodes.name: Post to Slack2
nodes.notes:
💬 SLACK NOTIFICATION
Channel: #daily-reports
Channel ID: C98765ZYXWV
Quick summary for team
